curriculum_excerpts.text: 高中11年级学段目标：理解并掌握「动量」的基本概念与方法
学业要求：能在真实情境中识别、运用「动量」解决问题
活动建议：通过观察、实验、练习、讨论等方式深化对「动量」的理解
理解冲量和动量。通过理论推导和实验，理解动量定理和动量守恒定律，能用其解释生产生活中的有关现象。
通过实验，了解弹性碰撞和非弹性碰撞的特点。定量分析一维碰撞问题并能解释生产生活中的弹性碰撞和非弹性碰撞现象。
能从理论推导和实验验证的角度，理解动量守恒定律，深化对物体之间相互作用规律的理解。能用动量和机械能的知识分析和解释机械运动现象，解决一维碰撞问题。
理解位移、速度和加速度。通过实验，探究匀变速直线运动的特点，能用公式、图像等方法描述匀变速直线运动。

exercises.stem: 依据课标「动量」：高中11年级学段目标：理解并掌握「动量」的基本概念与方法 请简要阐述并举例。
exercises.answer: 应答覆盖课标要点，体现掌握与应用。

exercises.stem: 比较说明：学业要求：能在真实情境中识别、运用「动量」解决问题
exercises.answer: 需写出关键概念、过程或方法，避免只背结论。

common_errors.text: 只背公式不做受力/过程分析
混淆现象描述与物理规律

Momentum 8.1 Linear Momentum, Force, and Impulse 8.2 Conservation of Momentum 8.3 Elastic and Inelastic Collisions We know from everyday use of the word momentum that it is a tendency to continue on course in the same direction. Newscasters speak of sports teams or politicians gaining, losing, or maintaining the momentum to win. As we learned when studying about inertia, which is Newton's first law of motion, every object or system has inertia—that is, a tendency for an object in motion to remain in motion or an object at rest to remain at rest. Mass is a useful variable that lets us quantify inertia. Momentum is mass in motion. Momentum is important because it is conserved in isolated systems; this fact is convenient for solving problems where objects collide. The magnitude of momentum grows with greater mass and/or speed. For example, look at the football players in the photograph (Figure 8.1). They collide and fall to the ground. During their collisions, momentum will play a large part. In this chapter, we will learn about momentum, the different types of collisions, and how to use momentum equations to solve collision problems. Figure 8.1 NFC defensive backs Ronde Barber and Roy Williams along with linebacker Jeremiah Trotter gang tackle AFC running back LaDainian Tomlinson during the 2006 Pro Bowl in Hawaii. (United States Marine Corps) Chapter Outline

Calculating Momentum: A Football Player and a Football (a) Calculate the momentum of a 110 kg football player running at 8 m/s. (b) Compare the player’s momentum with the momentum of a 0.410 kg football thrown hard at a speed of 25 m/s. Strategy No information is given about the direction of the football player or the football, so we can calculate only the magnitude of the momentum, p. (A symbol in italics represents magnitude.) In both parts of this example, the magnitude of momentum can be calculated directly from the definition of momentum: Solution for (a) To find the player’s momentum, substitute the known values for the player’s mass and speed into the equation. Solution for (b) To find the ball’s momentum, substitute the known values for the ball’s mass and speed into the equation. The ratio of the player’s momentum to the ball’s momentum is Discussion Although the ball has greater velocity, the player has a much greater mass. Therefore, the momentum of the player is about 86 times greater than the momentum of the football.
Calculating Force: Venus Williams’ Racquet During the 2007 French Open, Venus Williams (Figure 8.3) hit the fastest recorded serve in a premier women’s match, reaching a speed of 58 m/s (209 km/h). What was the average force exerted on the 0.057 kg tennis ball by Williams’ racquet? Assume that the ball’s speed just after impact was 58 m/s, the horizontal velocity before impact is negligible, and that the ball remained in contact with the racquet for 5 ms (milliseconds). Figure 8.3 Venus Williams playing in the 2013 US Open (Edwin Martinez, Flickr)

## 教材化讲解参考（由课标要点生成）

### 核心概念
动量是物理学习中的重要知识点。教学时应围绕课标要点“高中11年级学段目标：理解并掌握「动量」的基本概念与方法”展开，先明确概念边界，再通过例子、图示、实验、语篇或案例帮助学生建立可迁移的理解。

### 学习路径
1. 情境导入：以可观察实验或生活现象引入「动量」，先让学生描述现象，再提出可检验的问题。
2. 探究建构：强调控制变量、数据记录、图像分析和单位意识，避免只记公式不理解条件。
3. 应用迁移：围绕课标要点“高中11年级学段目标：理解并掌握「动量」的基本概念与方法”，设计预测—实验—解释—迁移的学习链条。

### 例题设计方向
可设计一道“识别核心概念”的基础题，一道“解释现象或文本材料”的理解题，一道“迁移到真实情境”的应用题，并要求学生说明依据。
